final:
// // This module implements a simple EEPROM cell with a single bit of data input (D), a clock signal (CLK), a write enable signal (WE), and an output signal (Q). When WE is high, the input data should be written to the output on the falling edge of the clock. When WE is low, the output should hold its last value. The output Q represents the stored value of the EEPROM cell.
module EEPROM (
    input wire D,         // Data input
    input wire CLK,       // Clock input
    input wire WE,        // Write enable
    output reg Q          // Data output
);
    
    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (WE) begin
            Q <= D;       // Write data to Q when WE is high
        end
        // else Q retains its previous value
    end
endmodule
